_comment: PRAXIS Universal Kit — Platform Detection Signatures v0.2
_description: Each platform entry defines how to detect the AI tool, where to inject governance files, and tier metadata.

platforms.name: OpenClaw
platforms.description: Deep integration: cron, heartbeat, memory system
platforms.notes: Deepest integration tier. Supports cron reminders, heartbeat passive collection, memory system maps to PRAXIS L4.

platforms.name: Claude Cowork (Claude Code / Claude.ai)
platforms.notes: Uses CLAUDE.md in project root or ~/.claude/ for user-level config. Claude Code CLI uses same mechanism.

platforms.name: OpenAI Codex / Codex CLI
platforms.description: OpenAI sandbox agent — AGENTS.md in project root
platforms.notes: Codex reads AGENTS.md for instructions. Environment variable OPENAI_API_KEY may indicate Codex usage.

platforms.name: Cursor
platforms.notes: Cursor reads .cursorrules from project root. Newer versions also support .cursor/rules/*.md for modular rules.

platforms.name: Windsurf
platforms.notes: Windsurf reads .windsurfrules from project root or .windsurf/ directory.

platforms.name: GitHub Copilot
platforms.notes: Copilot reads custom instructions from .github/copilot-instructions.md. Directory .github/ is a weak signal (also used for Actions).

platforms.name: Aider
platforms.notes: Aider reads CONVENTIONS.md and .aider.conf.yml. The conventions file is injected into the context automatically.

platforms.name: Continue.dev
platforms.notes: Continue.dev reads .continue/config.json. Rules can be injected as system prompts via the config.

platforms.name: Cline
platforms.notes: Cline reads .clinerules from project root or .cline/instructions.md.

platforms.name: Roo Code
platforms.notes: Roo Code reads .roorules or .roo/rules.md for persistent instructions.

platforms.name: Generic (any AI tool)
platforms.description: Fallback for any AI tool — plain PRAXIS_GOVERNANCE.md
platforms.notes: Works with any AI tool including ChatGPT web, Gemini, Perplexity. User pastes PRAXIS_GOVERNANCE.md content manually.
